channel.title: Featured on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Featured on Vandana Verma

item.title: LinkedIn Post - AI Governance Frameworks: EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF
item.description: Public LinkedIn post by Vandana Verma comparing the EU AI Act, ISO 42001, and NIST AI RMF as complementary AI governance frameworks.

item.title: LinkedIn Post - OWASP Top 10 for LLM04: Data and Model Poisoning
item.description: Public LinkedIn post by Vandana Verma explaining OWASP Top 10 for LLM04 and why data and model poisoning matter in AI systems.

item.title: LinkedIn profile
item.description: Public LinkedIn profile for Vandana Verma with experience summary, follower count, activity, and article inventory.

item.title: Sessionize speaker profile
item.description:
The Sessionize speaker profile is a strong public anchor for Vandana Verma because it brings together bio, speaker profile details, and a broader talk inventory in one place.

It is also one of the easier public pages to use when cross-checking talk titles and conference appearances.

Reference
https://sessionize.com/vandana-verma/

item.title: RSAC expert profile
item.description: Official RSAC expert page aggregating Vandana Verma Sehgal’s talks, webcast appearances, and panel video.

item.title: Snyk Blog - My Journey at Black Hat Asia 2025
item.description: Featured on the Snyk blog sharing the journey as a reviewer, speaker, panelist, speaker coach, and learner at Black Hat Asia 2025. Reflects on the multiple roles and contributions to the cybersecurity community at one of Asia’s premier security events.

item.title: Snyk contributor profile
item.description:
This page is a strong profile anchor because it combines current role wording, article history, and a public headshot in one place.

Reference
https://snyk.io/contributors/vandana-verma-sehgal/

item.title: GovInfoSecurity - Artificial Intelligence Looms Large at Black Hat Europe 2024
item.description: Quoted in GovInfoSecurity coverage of the Black Hat Europe 2024 Locknote panel discussion on AI, reality vs hype.

item.title: Cyber Leaders on the Move - Cyber Leadership Institute Feature
item.description: Featured in the Cyber Leadership Institute ‘Cyber Leaders on the Move’ series as Global Chair of OWASP and Security Relations Leader APJ/ANZ at Snyk.

item.title: Let's Chat Open Source Security
item.description:
Let’s Chat Open Source Security With Vandana Verma!

Reference

item.title: BBC World - Women in cybersecurity
item.description:
Kim Chakanetsa meets two cybersecurity experts who help women stay safe online.

Vandana Verma Sehgal is a Security Solutions leader at Snyk and the Chair of the Board of Directors for OWASP, the Open Web Application Security Project Foundation. She is also the founder of InfosecKids and InfosecGirls.

Sophina Kio-Lawson is an information security engineer from Nigeria and the co-founder for SheSecures, an initiative that promotes cyber literacy and inspires and empowers young African women who aspire to work in the tech industry.

item.title: SC Media - Contributor Profile
item.description: Contributor to SC Media (SCWorld), writing on cybersecurity topics including application security, DevSecOps, and diversity in the security industry.

item.title: Interview: Women in Cyber and Open Source Security — Cyber Protection Magazine
item.description:
Featured interview with Cyber Protection Magazine discussing the InfosecGirls initiative, the significance of open source security, and Vandana’s work at Snyk helping to ensure open source security. The conversation covered the impact of the pandemic on InfosecGirls, progress on gender balance in cybersecurity, and career opportunities for women in the field.

Reference
https://cyberprotection-magazine.com/interview-women-in-cyber-and-open-source-security

item.title: Redgate 100 - Most Influential in the Database Community 2022
item.description: Recognized as part of the Redgate 100 list, highlighting the most influential people in the database community for 2022.

item.title: Interview with ESG-global by Techtarget
item.description: Link - https://www.techtarget.com/esg-global/video/women-in-cybersecurity-vandana-verma/

item.title: Women in Cybersecurity
item.description:
Women in Cybersecurity

Reference

https://www.techtarget.com/esg-global/video/women-in-cybersecurity-vandana-verma/

item.title: Security Challenges in FinTech — Wallarm Researcher Corner
item.description:
Featured discussion with Wallarm’s Researcher Corner on security challenges in the FinTech space. The conversation covered OWASP Top 10 and related projects, modern FinTech cyber threats, the importance of designing secure architecture from the start, and the resources OWASP offers for securing financial applications.

Reference
https://lab.wallarm.com/security-challenges-in-fintech-discussion-with-vandana-verma-owasp/

item.title: I Had My Own Share Of Struggles But Learnt How To Survive And Stand Strong — Eat My News
item.description:
Featured interview with Eat My News, discussing the journey from struggles to becoming a recognized advocate in cybersecurity in India. The conversation covers career challenges, community building, and standing strong through adversity.

Reference
https://www.eatmy.news/2021/09/vandana-verma-sehgal-i-had-my-own-share.html

item.title: Interview with CISO MAG
item.description:
Celebrating Women in Cyber Security

To gain an insight into the lack of women representation, CISO MAG gauged a few women security influencers to understand the cause of this alarming trend. This article is part of a series of interviews from women cybersecurity experts who shed light representation of women in cybersecurity.

Reference https://cisomag.eccouncil.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/CISO-MAG_Mar_2021_Preview.pdf

item.title: INSPIRE 20 Leadership Podcast
item.description:
INSPIRE 20 Podcast: Vandana Verma Sehgal, Infosec Girls

https://techbeacon.com/enterprise-it/inspire-20-podcast-vandana-verma-sehgal-infosec-girls?utm_source=richisoc

https://cybersecurityworks.com/cyber-security-predictions-2021/vandana-verma.html

item.title: Featured in TimesofIndia
item.description:
Times webinar on cybersecurity and women hackers

Reference

item.title: Human Factor Security Interview with Vandana Verma
item.description:
In this interview Jenny talks to the multi award winning women’s advocate and member of OWASP global board of directors, Vandana Verma. They discuss her career in cyber, her promotion of women through groups like InfosecGirls, and how the pandemic has impacted cybersecurity in India and beyond. Thank you for an amazing interview, Vandana.

Reference

item.title: Inspiring Leaders at IBM India
item.description:
Inspiring Leaders at IBM India Interview

“It is my second stint with IBM, and I would call it fate, as I was not looking for a change and suddenly got a call from IBM for a profile which I felt, was relevant for me. I gave the interview and once again became an IBMer in 2017. IBM has given me a playground to experiment with the technology, and being with India Software labs makes me enjoy the technology even more.

item.title: Interview with CISO MAG
item.description:
Closing the Skill Gap With More Women in Cybersecurity

To gain an insight into the lack of women representation, CISO MAG gauged a few women security influencers to understand the cause of this alarming trend. This article is part of a series of interviews from women cybersecurity experts who shed light representation of women in cybersecurity.

Reference https://cisomag.eccouncil.org/closing-the-skill-gap-with-more-women-in-cybersecurity/3/
